scope.notes: No formula derivation or proof. Bayes' theorem shown as named equation only with explicit disclaimer ('not expected to derive or prove it'). Base rate fallacy named and deferred. LLM detail deferred to 7.4. Navigation example is an application of Bayesian updating within topic scope.
